2.-mytharia/people/adventurers-mytharia/.title: Coletta D. Coolington
2.-mytharia/people/adventurers-mytharia/.description:
Infobox Coletta D. Coolington was a vampire hunter in the Coolington family some centuries ago. She's said to have had a girlfriend who was a princess with pink hair from a far off kingdom and she wielded a powerful greatsword.
Known lore on Coletta ends when her sister was turned into an evil vampire, and Coletta became known under the alias "The Gentleman Prince".

2.-mytharia/people/adventurers-mytharia/.title: Coolio D. Coolington
2.-mytharia/people/adventurers-mytharia/.description:
Infobox Coolio D. Coolington is a senior high school student at Sir Antoine A. Adventure's Adventuring Academy. He began his quest as a lonely teen with no friends who sat alone in taverns everyday hoping that someone would talk with him and possibly take him on an adventure. (what a loser... yet so cool!)Coolio eventually achieved this wish and formed the 3CDS which later got rebranded to The Outsiders. Since then he has become the most powerful of them by far as his latent potential has continued to bloom since he came out of his shell and began to unlock it.Coolio is a naïve character who wants to do good in the world and wants to change the world for the better. He wants to be able to protect everyone and save everyone no matter the cost.Coolio began as a shy kid but has grown more into himself as a capable adventurer. He's still shy, he's still a kid, but he's also more sure of his abilities and especially of his own parties capabilities now. He is naïve and wants to see the good in the world and change it for the better, and he wants to protect everyone and save everyone no matter the cost. But as he's been adventuring he's been faced with not being able to save everyone, and been faced with having to kill, to end life. Adventure has changed Coolio Coolington as it changes everyone.Coolio grew up in a family of 13 siblings with each one being born in a different month. Coolio is the middle child. His family is a noble one revered in his town, Coolsville, for their saviour during The Planaclysm when the crops were dying and the Coolington's managed to revitalise them.As a child he grew up with an appreciate for magic and a drive to adventure and protect people. He spent much time in the wilderness with his sister Barna who went on to become a druid. During their childhood Barna taught Coolio a fair amount about magic while he also practiced his swordplay.Once he became old enough, he moved to Goldas to attend Sir Antoine A. Adventure's Adventuring Academy as a high school wizard student. During his time there he lived in dorms, returning home during holidays to visit his family.As his final year of high school came around, the senior year adventuring project was doled out. A project to simply to go on a small adventure. Raid one tier 1.5 or above dungeon, slay one tier 2 or above monster, assassinate a political leader, forge or enchant a rare or better magic item. Do any of these things simply to prove to the school that you're ready to graduate and go out into the world and adventure for yourself. Students are given 1 school year to prepare themselves and complete this task and are encouraged to take on this challenge alongside other classmates, forming their first adventuring parties so they share their skills and adventure together.
Coolio was a shy kid who had no friends so for his first 2 months of the project he sat alone in taverns hoping someone will talk to him and possibly take him on an adventure, but each day failing to initiate a conversation with anyone, until The Outsiders.Coolio's Shadow Bitch allows him to command it to hug a creature within 20 feet twice per day and twin a spell he's casting on himself to another creature. Graduate Adventuring Academy and become someone great Cure his grandmothers unknown cancer The Coolington Family Sir Antoine A. Adventure's Adventuring Academy The dead god Tiamat His great great grandfather lives and prowls the coast of the north pole cataloguing what he can find.

2.-mytharia/people/adventurers-mytharia/.title: Florian of Greenest
2.-mytharia/people/adventurers-mytharia/.description:
Infobox art by bialbovi
Florian is a former soldier of the greenest empire, turned spy for grognak who was later executed for his crimes before rising as a Martyr of Karamy. Upon rising he aided in the attempt to uncover the conspiracy surrounding the missing Millicent of Frostont and other spirits who had been disappearing from the streets of New Dougleton. Upon forming The Chaos Crew with his allies at the end of this quest, they ended up taking to the seas so they could search for The Fang of The Abyss in hopes to prevent the aquatic calamity set to befall The Divergent Isles.Florian is a pessimistic leaning soldier. He says what he thinks when he can allow himself too without speaking in riddles, but he's still more guarded on his past and the things that he regrets in life. He has some anger issues, but the anger is most often internalised and directed at himself. He's selfless, but because he doesn't care about what happens to him thinking that anything which befalls him is just what he deserves for the things that he has done. Florian is a former soldier of The Greenest Empire. Even before the war he came from a patriotic family with his parents looking fondly toward the military of Greenest and encouraging him to enlist once the drafting started before the war with Grognak. His siblings, Soren, and Seraphina, sought to avoid their parents and their patriotism, but while Florian was still there he still believed.Once the drafts began and Florian was drafted into the military, during training he met Renata as the two clicked and became fast friends. However, they didn't discuss the politics of the war nor the grim events which surrounded their lives. Florian also continued to talk with his sister even once the war began. She could tell he was deeply brainwashed and she slowly tried to talk him out of it without outing herself as being against the empire.In the battlegrounds, Florian was placed as a scout to watch for enemies or to check out the surrounding areas for strategic positioning. Him and Renata didn't see each other again after training, seemingly never in the same squads or parties. until one day Florian was on the battlefield fighting against a party of Grognak soldiers. He fought and as he struck down a Grognak solider he didn't see who it really was, that it was Renata, until the blow had been struck and she was on the ground horribly injurred. Paralysed in the wake of his actions, with the battle not going well, and his party losing to those from the Grognak party, Florian felt like he could die now and that it would be what he deserved. He stood there, blank, his party had to drag him from the battlefield in retreat so that he would not be killed.
Upon his later death at war, the God Karamy, The False Sufferer was impressed by his suffering and chose to raise his soul as a spirit and place it into the greatsword he once wielded so he might rise and become a great martyr to fated death more spectacular and tragic than the one that had already befallen him.
His ascent from the sword however, was put on hold, as the spirit binder, Jean-Guy of Wingspan was travelling to Greenest City and happened to hear about the anomaly of the sword that had changed. And so, he purchased it from the military and brought it back to New Dougleton for study among the many other artifacts and bound spirits which he kept.Then from there, eventually when the group who would become known as The Chaos Crew was raiding Jean Guy's office, Florian's vampiric sword fell to the ground and it jostled him awake and out of the sword. He was now, Karamy's martyr, and it was time for him to fight again so it seemed.During the early days of the war, Seraphina, Florian's older sister kept in contact with him through the patriotism and she still tried to talk with him seeing how brainwashed he was to the cause. She slowly tried to get him out of that mess as she dodged the draft to war herself, and while trying to avoid getting outed for her beliefs against the empire.

2.-mytharia/people/civilians-mytharia/ni.title: Nick Name
2.-mytharia/people/civilians-mytharia/ni.description: Infobox Nick Name is a man with an anomalous ability to give newborn children the perfect names, and works a full doctor's salary. he has worked across several different hospitals across the world naming children. his names are like an artform to him and the public. Being named by Nick can be seen as an honour for those who knows. The first name he gave was to himself when he himself was born.

2.-mytharia/people/shopkeepers-mytharia/.title: Lemon
2.-mytharia/people/shopkeepers-mytharia/.description: Infobox Lemon is a lightning oni who was abandoned as a child and bought by Catamari then raised as a pseudo-daughter/slave alongside Terra. she later adopted a red dragon wyrmling.

2.-mytharia/people/forsythia-mythralight.title: Forsythia Mythralight
2.-mytharia/people/forsythia-mythralight.description:
Infobox
Art by AshC Warren Mythralight Viktor Mythralight
Forythia Mythralight is an ancient vampiric wizard and the progenitor of all vampires. She has been sighted many times since she left wider society after her turn into a Vampire, but her goals and whereabouts since The Planaclysm and the fall of Dougleton.
What is known of her current day is that she travels with her husband Rhodri Mythralight but not with her children.
Before she became a vampire, she was the head of house Mythralightfrom 1,052 FA to 2 ME. She rebuilt it from the brink of destruction in the wake of her fathers death and became the arcane advisor to the at the time king Robril Starsteel before she left it behind to found Greenest City. Her leaving that position for such a strange reason was shocking at the time, but it became clear later that she had done so for the express purpose of the ritual which transformed her and her family into the first vampires.Forsythia is a haughty noble. Though she is not truly part of a noble house anymore, she still acts like the peak of nobility which is likely due in part to her arrogance at knowing that she is one of the most powerful beings in Mytharia and there is nary a chance that anyone should have the ability to kill her.Forsythia is an embodiment of arrogance and belief that she is better and more powerful than others. She is petty but also lazy and depending on the scale of the sleight, she is sometimes impressed when people have the courage to even attempt to cause her issue. She is also often lazy and unwanting to deal with anyone who does any small happenstance inconvenience to her. But if you cause her enough of a headache she will stop at nothing to wipe you from the face of history no matter where you go.Forsythia grew up in the noble circles of Dougstar and Dougleton during the Age of Adventure. The first age after the fall of the empires of scale and flower where the world was a frontier to explore again.
The Mythralight family throughout all of history has been known for its powerful magical bloodline and the perpetual rumour that the first Mythralight was a daughter of The Lady of Arcana herself. As such, Forsythia has trained in and studied magic for all her life and by the time she was an adult was already a highly accomplished wizard.
Though she became a highly accomplished wizard, Forsythia was born into House Mythralight during its lowest point when it was on the brink of collapse. When she was 24, on the 5th of Mystrath, 1,052 FA, her father Eduardo Mythralight died of pnemonia, leaving her as the new head of the house. Historians have since theorised that she may have caused the pnemonia which killed him but there is no clear evidence for this. Her mother still lived and advised her but was ignored until 12 years later when she died in 1,064 FA.
She spent the next three decades of her life rebuilding House Mythralight from the ashes it had nearly fallen to. The first major step toward rebuilding the house was her landing the job as King Robril Starsteel's Arcane Advisor in 1,053 FA. In this single move she gained a considerable amount of power and funds which only grew as she continued acting in her position and developing powerful magic items and spells while she advised the king on all things magical within Dougleton. On the 6th of Solas, 1,053 FA she would marry Rhodri Roderick Roddenheim who would take her name due to her house's higher status than his.
As she continued in her position, she also went on to expand house Mythralight by having three children. Her firstborn child Viktor Mythralight was born on the 22nd of Owlen 1,055 Fa. She attempted to train him in the arcane arts, but was continually busy with her job as the arcane advisor causing her to spend little time with him in his childhood.
Her second child, Gwendolyn Mythalight would be born on the 27th of Fieldrenary, 1,058 FA. Forsythia put a high degree of care into the conception and birth of Gwendolyn so she would be born in a place of power and on a full moon of Vamperum. Forsythia actually put a great degree of care into Gwendolyn's childhood, attempting to raise her into a powerful wizard like herself, smothering her with incredible amounts of training and studying.Her third and final child was born on the 5th of Owlen, 1,062 FA. Warren was ignored most of his childhood and eventually sent away to Dawnforge to learn combat skills.
Throughout her time as King Robril Starsteel's Arcane Advisor, she developed over a dozen spells and created hundreds, possibly thousands of magic items. But eventually she rather suddenly packed it all up and left to found Greenest, taking only her husband and children with her as they organised a caravan to settle the area.
Shortly after arrival in Greenest she employed the adventuring party who would later be known as The Saviours of Greenest to gather for her various materials used in the ritual to turn herself and her family into vampires. Gwendolyn Mythalight had not been informed of the ritual and didn't wish to die to complete it, so a confrontation occurred between the two groups, with The Saviours of Greenest successfully saving Gwendolyn from the ritual. The purpose unknown to them, they buried The Mythralights after their suicide to later discover they'd risen from the graves.
Forsythia had another skirmish with the group after kidnapping her daughter back from the group who had saved her. During this time she cut off Gwendolyn's hands to prevent her from casting magic, intending to later turn her into a Vampire alongside the rest of them. The Saviours of Greenest however managed to drive back Forsythia who was forced to retreat due to temporarily losing her magic after turning.
It is unclear what happened in the time succeeding these events. There have been scarce sightings of her over the last thousand years. Some believe she is involved with Titan Blood trade in Rextaulia, but there is little to substantitate this claim.

2.-mytharia/people/vlad-the-inflator.htm.title: Vlad The Inflator
2.-mytharia/people/vlad-the-inflator.htm.description:
Infobox Vlad is a former member of The Seven Evil Opps, and a villain seeking to turn inflatables into a dominant race in Mytharia. As a young adult he was hit with wild magic that changed him into an inflatable man made of rubber, and it made him feel stronger, it made him feel better than he was before.He's a man bent on spreading his genes.
For a time, he was a rival to Spider-Volt, until he was swallowed by a dragon and went into hiding. He however, has never stopped his quest for the inflatable race.Driven and knowledge hungry, Vlad has spent his life searching for arcane truths. He seeks to understand the magic of the world and find ways to bend it to his goals. Before his transformation, his goals were simply, power and influence, but since his transformation he's developed an obsession with jumpstarting the inflatable race. He carries with him an intense xenophobia of those who are not inflatables like himself because of his perceived superiority over others. He believes himself to be altruistic, that the world will be better if more people are inflated, that people will realise that being inflatable and rubber is superior to being made of flesh and bone.Vlad was born to the noble house Lanister in Rextaulia. For most of his life, he served the house as a simple arcane researcher. However, one day there was an unprecedented wild magic storm in an area he was researching. While he was researching the storm he was hit with a pure bolt of wild magic that transformed his body. Instead of a yowie, he was now a man made of rubber, an inflatable man. At first he was distraught over the change, but in time, he grew to believe he was better this way, that everyone would be better this way. He had a special rapier enchanted that would cause things to implode or inflate on impact, and donned the mantle of Vlad the Inflator.
In his new identity, Vlad sought to make more inflatables like himself. He began researching spells that changed peoples bodies and ways to do it on people without their consent, when he found out to his own surprise that people did not want the future he wished to create, the bodies he wished to give them. This brought him at odds with Spider-Volt as the two did battle on several occasions. Vlad was defeated several times and his labs destroyed, but he escaped each time and was forced to start again.
This was, until, an auction in the Oktober of 1017 ME organised by Lalythyxion. This auction was to be a major event in the crime world of Renexann with many of the cities most infamous criminals and villains being there. Vlad, as a personal friend of Lalythyxion was of course invited and attended. An adventuring party however, crashed this auction using invitations from Catamari. They sought to steal many of the items up for bid, but the auction was attacked by a dragon of fire. Vlad and one of the adventuers, Terra, tried to fight back against the dragon but both were swallowed in the process. This adventuring party went on to spend several days tracking down the dragons lair so they could rescue their compatriot, and upon slaying the dragon they happened to save Vlad as well. One of these adventurers, Lyre Thair'Monistadt took it upon themself to nurse Vlad back to health in wake of his injuries sustained from the dragon.Lyre and Vlad grew very close during this time, with their relationship culminating in a one-night stand near the end of Fieldrenary in 1018 ME. They had a brief relationship when Vlad was healed, until Vlad shared his new arcane lab with Lyre and his plan to turn Lyre into an inflatable fox. Lyre immediately was terrified by the situation and feigned support before saying he needed to get milk and leaving Vlad forever. However, Vlad planned for when Lyre got back, to tell them that their one-night stand had ended in him being pregnant. Lyre never returned though and Vlad later found out he was pregnant with triplets. Throughout the pregnancy Vlad debated what he wanted to name the children. He was excited for his inflatable lineage and chose for their future names to be Rory, Douge, and Misty.
When Vlad was a few months away from giving birth, he went to attend his cousin Lexathon's wedding. While he was at a nearby bar the night before the wedding, he met Caspien and realised quickly that he was a gullible kid that he could probably kidnap and turn into an inflatable. So he did just that luring Cas with promise that they would go to the BL bookstore, but on the way, he knocked Cas unconscious and brought him back to his arcane labratory and imprisoned him there to deal with after the wedding was complete. There was however drama with the wedding in which Lexathon told Clarence-Clark that the wedding was going to be called off once everyone got to the venue. So Clarence-Clark planned to arrive late and on his way ran into Lyre Thair'Monistadt who happened to be in town. The pair talked and Lyre offhandedly mentioned his ex that was an inflatable man that was super into eugenics and turning other people into inflatables. Clarence-Clark immediately remembered all the strange comments that Vlad had made about wishing there were more inflatables like him and how he only wishes he could change more people into inflatables like him. Clarence-Clark then snuck into Vlad's house and managed to find his arcane labratory. Inside, he found Cas imprisoned there. The wedding ended up happening with Lexathon being disappointed at Clarence-Clark's absense, and when the wedding was over, Vlad immediately knew he had to get home because he remembered the strange looks he'd gotten from Clarence when discussing his thoughts on turning people into inflatables. Clarence-Clark hears Vlad coming down the stairs and rushes Cas to escape, so Cas summons a meteor to help them escape. The meteor crashes down and Vlad is only partially injured in the explosion. He quickly rushed to get medical attention fearing for the worst, luckily he only had a mild concussion, but unfortunately, he lost the babies.Vlad and Lyre had a brief amorous relationship that lead to Vlad becoming pregnant. Vlad still waits for Lyre to return with the milk, so that he can inflate Lyre and they can be together in their true bodies as their best selves. Until he lost the babies, he would continue to send at least weekly sendings to lyre asking when his virile concubine would return. When he lost his and Lyre's babies, he was distraught and blamed himself. Vlad believes he's no longer worthy of Lyre and won't be until he proves himself worthy of that love again, by siring a race of inflatables for him and Lyre to steward together.
A rival to Vlad and one who has proved a vexing opponent, Vlad harbours much ire towards The Lightning Spider. Vlad hates him for every time Spider-Volt has destroyed his work and his progress. He sees Spider-Volt as a menace and a constant roadblock to his success and the great world he will create. Vlad believes it is his destiny to spearhead the inflatable race and that Spider-Volt is an insect he will have to crush along the way.

headers.heading: Lyre Thair'Monistadt
Spider-Volt

2.-mytharia/planets/mytharia-planet/grie.title: Remnil
2.-mytharia/planets/mytharia-planet/grie.description:
Infobox Remnil is one of two dominant countries in Griedoria. It was established shortly after The Planaclysm by refugees from the fallen countries of Dougleton, Arcadium, and Dawnforge. The noble houses that once governed Dougleton quickly became dominant again as the country grew its foothold with the survivors of The Planaclysm. The country flourished mainly in the fields of arcane research like Arcadium and Dougleton had done before, but also took an interest in the documentation of history should another disaster like The Planaclysm occur again in future.
In the current age, Remnil is home to some of the brightest and most powerful mages in Mytharia who work to further arcane research. One of the primary places of study being REMU, a university and place of study for those gifted with magic.
The country is primarily wooded with a wet climate due to its close proximity to the ocean. A mountain range leftover from when Griedoria and Vortil split during The Planaclysm decorates the northwestern region of Remnil just south of the city of Dungeon.Remnil's society is very independant with a focus on self-sufficence. There is a lot of community around research and study with it being very easy usually to find research partners when drafting experiments and the like. However, outside of the realm of magic and study, the people of Remnil generally believe that it's your job to find your place in society and support yourself and your family.Remnil's main form of worship and religion, is in the worship of the departed spirits of their ancestors. Citizens of Remnil usually keep detailed family histories and family trees, and will keep shrines to their most venerated ancestors to attempt to call on their spirits for guidance when needed. This is especially common among the noble houses of Remnil, and among those with spellcasters in their family.
The most common careers in Remnil are those in the spellcasting class of society; Enchanters, Summoners, Spirit Binders, and the like. Adventurers are also very common especially in Remnil's second largest city, Dungeon because the city is half-built into a dungeon that seems to be constantly shifting and growing beneath the city.Within the country, necromancy is the only illegal form of magic. Similarly, most undead are killed on sight by the country's military. Skeletons, vampires, and zombies being among those undead that are executed swiftly.
A web of interconnected noble houses govern Remnil, lead by House Starsteel who governed Dougleton before its destruction. Among these houses are House Adamantine which controls the largest amount of military within the country, House Orichalcum which holds control over the healing guilds in the country, and House Stygite which has the largest hold over commerce and trade, being the house that mints the currency.
Another noble house, House Mythralight was also considered one of the great noble houses of Remnil until its recent destruction. Its unknown if any survivors remain, other than the Mythralight's who broke off just before The Planaclysm and are believed to still wander the world. House Mythralight previously held control over the mages guild of Remnil, The Lustrous Mist. But since then House Starsteel has taken control.
The government is organised with House Starsteel, and King Rozam Starsteel in the central administration and governance of the country, while delegating tasks and aspects of leadership and administration to the other great noble houses and representatives
Though close geographically to Kindwyn due to being neighbours on the continent, Remnil and Kindwyn don't share a very close relationship or trade very much, but they do share a small amount of trade with food. Kindwyn also exports some magical plants that only grow there to Remnil.Remnil's biggest trade partners are with Resanthum, and Rextaulia due to their large exports of gems and metals respectively.
The country was founded in 5 ME, by King Robril Starsteel shortly after the end of The Planaclysm. He lead a large group of refugees from Arcadium, Dougleton, and Dawnforge across Vortil eventually making it to where New Dougleton stands now before Griedoria split off from Vortil.
New Dougleton grew quickly due to the amount of mages among the settlers, and from the dawnian dwarves' skills in construction. The country later expanded north and surveyors discovered a massive dungeon at the northwestern edge of the continent in 22 ME. Eventually, the civilisation within the dungeon was peacefully integrated (wow how often does that happen) into Remnil as a whole. This city became known as Dungeon.There are some rumours of spirits going missing around the country, especially in the capitol. some believe there's a secret project being worked on to try and innoculate the population with abilities from these kidnapped spirits.Some believe that the fall of House Mythralight was not an unfortunate accident, but something orchestrated by higher powers in the country.
The capitol city of the country, New Dougleton is home to a lot of the magical research in the country, as well as the castle of House Starsteel and King Rozam Starsteel. New Dougleton is known as a good place to find magical materials and supplies, and contains a grand library of all historic events and books the scribes of Remnil have managed to assemble. Some say this library even contains a few records from the Age of Lost.Considered by some to be sort of the shadow capitol, Dungeon is the largest city in Remnil. It extends not only on the surface, but into the depths of an evershifting dungeon that seems to continually renew the magic artifacts, materials, and monsters housed within. Dungeon is also considered the financial capitol of the country due to the heavy exporting of items and materials from within. It is however also the city with the most deaths annually due to the consistent stream of not only crown hired adventurers, but visiting adventurers coming to delve into the dungeon at the city's heart.
This university is considered by most to be the best theoretical and practical magic university in Mytharia. It has incredible facilities and resources, alongside its staff and centuries of research on magic. REMU itself is also a university town with several different campus buildings with different specialisations in the town, and staff and students typically living on-site. Most would-be mages aspire to go to REMU if possible, especially over options like Sir Antoine A. Adventure's Adventuring Academy.
Most commonly found within Remnil are humans, pimawtawn, and dwarves because of the countries original settlers. Minotaurs later became a large population in the country after the integration of Dungeon. Its elven population is comprised of drow who were shunted to Remnil from The Feywild during The Planaclysm. The country also has an average spirit population and a relatively high population of birdfolk due to their arrival from The Skylands.

Dungeon

2.-mytharia/planets/mytharia-planet/the-.title: Lazulain
2.-mytharia/planets/mytharia-planet/the-.description: Infobox Lazulain is an underwater country between The Divergent Isles and Faiftexl. They focus on the export of magical objects created by mages raised in the lower class as workers while the upper class of noble houses typically marry members of the lower class into their ranks seeing it as an act of benevolence.

2.-mytharia/planets/mytharia-planet/vort.title: Rextaulia
2.-mytharia/planets/mytharia-planet/vort.description: Infobox Rextaulia is based mainly in refinement. They take imports and refine them into other things before exporting them.Their primarily dealings are in potions and scrolls. Many advanced potioncrafting techniques were pioneered here, or were built on techniques from Dawnforge. Their control of these substances is very tight for fear of the population succumbing to the ill effects of more volatile ingredients or drugs, but due to this and it having so many port cities, black markets and underground trades actually thrive in Rextaulia consequently making it the easiest place to find illicit materials if you're really looking.Rextaulia is a hybrid country based both over and underground. most major cities have segmants and above and below ground with some smaller towns only being one or the other.Another thing Rextaulia is known for is, even though their lucent population is rather low, a large amount of them are anomalies, born with different unique abilities and forms of magic that can then often become hereditary

2.-volteya/people/adventurers-volteya/ou.title: Oukruh
2.-volteya/people/adventurers-volteya/ou.description:
Infobox
Oukruh, The Psionic Sunburst, is a powerful saiyan superhero residing within Fulmin. As a young child he was inspired by The Volteyan Avengers to become a hero and protect people so he could get stronger and face tougher threats and live up to his potential. He does this to prove his worth and to prove he is good enough. He's currently in a situationship with his best friend Duel-Lilah, just seeing her as his best friend and not thinking about it veyr much because he's very passive.Oukruh is a kindhearted saiyan who fights to protect people because he wants to make his power matter. He believes that anyone with power should be helping people but is passive to peoples free will. Oukruh avidly listens to music because he enjoys the vibrations and how it interacts with his powers and makes him feel.
In relationships, Oukruh is a bit naive and very oblivious towards the feelings of others as well as his own, due in part to head trauma he received trying to learn to use his powers. He sees Duel-Lilah as his best friend he can never be separated from, and that he wants to be with forever. He's very prideful in his saiyan abilities and heritage, and he's always focused on getting stronger to focus on protecting people more. He then views his psionic powers as an extension of his will, and as a gift. He thinks that they are a boon to allow him to help people. His view on his sexuality is that he doesn't see himself as a part of the gay community, but he aplauds their achievements and thinks homophobia is wrong. He knows he's attracted to men and women but he doesn't think about it very much because he needs to save people and puts others above himself. He thinks that he's not good enough but by saving people he can prove his worth.
When Oukruh was 4 years old his psionic powers manifested before his saiyan powers and he made a rock explode. His father, seeing him manifest these weird power, seemingly instead of his normal ones, called him a freak of nature. His father tried to turn him into the Volteyan government because of this dangerous power but his mother talked him down from doing so. Eventually his normal powers also manifested and he was very proud that they did.
Oukruh grew up in Fulmin and when he was 10 years old he watched the members of the Volteyan Avengers do Volt 9/11 and seeing these brave heroes try to destroy The Thundercloud to protect people from the heinous Volt King inspired him to want to do the same. He began his heroing career when he was 13 and he told his parents. When he did they encouraged him because it meant he would fight and get stronger.
Oukruh met Duel-Lilah in a class in their freshman year of high school. Oukruh did aggressively mediocre in school but Duel-Lilah did extremely well so they started talking one day when Oukruh asked to cheat off her homework. But then on the first test where they did that Duel-Lilah happened to get every single question wrong so they failed together and got chastised by the teacher after for their horrible scores. After that they started hanging out and studying together, rather than cheating off each other so that this wouldn't happen again. Master his super saiyan abilities

2.-volteya/people/civillians-volteya/and.title: Andy 'Zuliani' Zuliani
2.-volteya/people/civillians-volteya/and.description:
Infobox
Andy 'Zuliani' Zuliani is a waiter at the Two Heels Diner in Zappingham. He was originally born in Fulmin and grew up there before moving around to earn his degrees. He did a bachelors in fashion in Fulmin before doing a masters degree in shoe design in Sparkopolis. However Andy has struggled to find a career with his degrees and has ended up working at as a waiter.
Andy is a pretty laid back guy who just wants to get through his day to day at the diner so he can go home to further his personal work. He's driven to succeed in his creative work but is continually finding it hard to continue and find opportunities for these endeavours under the reign of The Volt King.
In 1970 AVK, Andy was born to an average suburban family in Fulmin and grew up there throughout most of his early life. During his teenage years he became exposed to the world of fashion and particularly the intricacies of heels and the culture around them. This sparked a lifelong passion as when he graduated high school he moved on to attend Sparkfire University to complete a bachelors in fashion design.During his years at Sparkfire University is also when he realised the art world chafes a lot under the rule of the volt king and decided to take burger flipping and restaurant waitering as electives so he'd have skills to fall back on.
After his stint at Sparkfire University, Andy went on to do a masters degree in shoe design in Sparkopolis, minoring in fashion politics. It was during this time that Andy became active in the underground art world of protest and propaganda against The Volt King. He attended many secret events and protests, as well as a lot of parties while he was in the midst of his degree.
However, once his masters was complete Andy became loosely involved with an organisation known as The Cloudbreakers. He designed the shoes for their outfits and composed their theme song. But when most of The Cloudbreakers were killed by the wrath of The Volt King and the efforts of Volt Action during the failed Operation Cloudfall, he decided that for now he just wants to get through the day and hung up shoemaking falling back onto becoming waiter and getting a job at a small diner outside Sparkopolis called the Wayfarer's Lighthouse.
Andy was working at the diner one evening when Two Wordz came in shortly after meeting Wyenne Belswanna Coochiggly Murdendrum, rescuing her from her abusive stepmother, and fighting a kraken. The band was being served by Andy with Goojoo even ordering his favourite, the Ruben, when the diner was attacked by a jellyfish-like titan. This titan had been there for Wyenne's locket which the group was going to give to them until one of their members, Trevor, leapt through a portal the titan created last minute to make sure it didn't steal the locket.
After this terrifying attack on the diner, he quickly quit his job and decided it was time to move. He moved continents, going so far as to move all the way to Zappingham where he got a job at the Two Heels Diner.
His uneventful work was however interrupted a few months later when The Outsiders met Two Wordz at this diner and were attacked by Viles Vorals of Volt Action for their crimes against the fulminated crown. As this battle occurred instead of hiding, Andy ran to get out of there as soon as possible.

2.-volteya/people/civillians-volteya/gin.title: Ginny Stitch
2.-volteya/people/civillians-volteya/gin.description: Infobox Ginny Stitch is a seamstress from Sparksville. He has been sewing most of her life and especially has a passion for pillows. She started dating Johnny Razor several years ago after the two met at a library.Ginny is a seamstress. She's a little bit of a bitch, but he really enjoys his job and making sure people rest comfortably.Her and Johnny are very close. They've been dating a little over a year now. He doesn't like Johnny's obsession with Silver Lawson, but doesn't want to get in the way of his hobbies. She wants Johnny to find a job soon and doesn't like that he's currently supporting the both of them, especially with the concert tickets he just bought with the last of the money he had saved from his last job.GInny doesn't like The Volt King, but also he just sees The Volt King's reign as the way of the world. The Volt King is their god and he's the one who ushered them into the modernity and convenience they have today. Yeah, the monthly tithe isn't fun, the aggressive military isn't fun, but not having to fear monsters and having modern technology are tradeoffs.

2.-volteya/volteya-overview.html.title: Volteya Overview
2.-volteya/volteya-overview.html.description:
Volteya is a world built in fan fiction tropes. It features plot contrivances, omegaverse, and others all for the sake of its main themingThe Main Theme of Volteya is to show what things could be like if you made the smallest changes. The person you could have become if you'd had different people in your life, or if the world had been different enough to make you someone else.Volteya is a modern setting meant to be reminiscent of the early 2010s featuring all the trappings of the like such as phones and other modern technology. There's parodies present of real world things and the setting is meant to be vaguely North American so it feels almost like a splinter of the real world, mixed in with worldbuilding from Mytharia.
People can still be born lucent or aphotic here but don't possess visual differences as such. Vampires Werewolves, and Witches are all common as factions with tension between one another to play on the tropes of the supernatural present.The setting itself is ruled by a god king known only as The Volt King. He is vaguely known to have reached apotheosis 2000 years ago and stunted the development of technology to keep it at this modern level. When he reached apotheosis in his first display of divine power he either accidentally or intentionally sundered what was one continent into two.The setting features other lands beyond Volteya but their actual depiction isn't relevant to the story at hand other than as the setpiece that Volteya is a powerhungry nation ruled by a tyrant that wants to expand beyond his current domain, that he wants to expand to other parts of this planet through an endless war that keeps the citizens in fear and also placated by the notion of their military protecting them.The Volt King has emissaries of his power, people he bestows with sparks of his power or artifacts he has created as his peacekeepers and his soldiers. The Bear King, Volt Action, and others each have something from him to flex their divine authority on behalf of god.Volteya is a theocracy, they worship their god as their ruler and their ruler as their god.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/creatures/archgamis.title: Archgamisk
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/creatures/archgamis.description: Medium, celestialArmor Class 21Hit Points 297 (22d10+168)Speed 50 ft., fly 150 ft.Str 26 +8 Dex 22 +6 Con 26 +8 Int 25 +7 Wis 25 +7 Cha 30 +10 Saves Dexterity +13 Constitution +15 Skills Deception +14 Perception +14 Persuasion +17 Sleight of hand +13 Damage Resistances bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacksDamage Immunities poison, radiantCondition Immunities charmed, exhausted, frightened, poisoned,Senses truesight 120 ft., passive Perception 24Languages Common, sylvanChallenge 21 (33,000 XP)Proficiency Bonus +7Divine Awareness The Archgamisk knows if it hears a lie Legendary Resistance (4/Day) If the archgamisk fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. Gambler's Luck (6/Day) The archgambisk can choose to predict the number they're going to roll on an attack roll or check. They can choose to predict odd or even. On a success, the check has advantage; On a failure, the check has disadvantage. They can also choose to narrow and try to predict the exact number. Guessing the number correctly they immediately crit, and on a failure they critically fail. Multiattack The archgambisk makes three Gambler's blade attacks. They can switch out any Gambler's Blade attack with a Card throw Gambler's Blade Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d6 + 8) piercing damage plus 27 (6d8) radiant damage. Card Throw Ranged Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 60/200 ft., one target. Hit: 34 (6d6 + 10) damage. The damage type depends on the suit of the card drawn. Clubs (lightning), diamonds (force), hearts (psychic), spades (piercing), wands (fire), swords (slashing), pentacles (thunder), goblets (poison). If it is a card without a suit it deals radiant damage. Teleport The Archgambisk magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Burst of Luck (Costs 2 Actions) The Archgambisk makes an attack with advantage. Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions) The Archgambisk beats its wings. Each creature within 15 ft. of it must succeed on a DC 25 Dexterity saving throw or take 31 (6d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. The archgambisk can then fly up to half its flying speed. Bend Luck (3/Day) As a reaction when a creature makes an ability check, saving throw, or attack roll, the archgambist can impose disadvantage on the roll by stealing the creatures luck. The next time the archgambisk makes the same type of roll, they make it with advantage.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/ammunition/bo.title: Bolt of Biting
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/ammunition/bo.description:
Infobox On a hit, this bolt deals normal damage and forces the target to make a DC 15 consitution saving throw or take 2d6 poison damage per round for the next minute.
At the end of its turn the creature cat reroll the saving throw against being poisoned.This effect is cumulative if the creature is hit with multiple Bolts of Biting.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/boots/the-dar.title: The Dark Airforces
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/boots/the-dar.description: Infobox These black sneakers house within them a powerful malevolent spirit that will enhance the wearer with aspects of its strength while slowly corrupting them to its ways.While wearing and attuned to these shoes, the wearer gains the fallowing benefits.Shadowstep: You gain a 10ft increase to your movement speed and you can use your movement to teleport through any point of shadow as a bonus action if you are currently standing in darkness.Radiant Corruption: Whenever you deal radiant damage, you can choose to instead deal necrotic damage.Dark Aura: The dark aura of the black airforces infiltrates your speech. You gain advantage on intimidation checks and expertise in Intimidation.Gangsta Missile: You can cast gangsta missile at will.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/boots/the-lig.title: The Light Airforces
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/boots/the-lig.description: Infobox These white pearlescent sneakers house within them the powerful essence of a spirit of friendship and family. If this spirit allows the wearer to attune, it will guide and protect the wearer with all it's heart.The shoes are a pearlescent white and yellow inscribed with black text in Tiruin that says ABC. At the back of the shoes they are adorned with rainbow wings. The shoes contain the spirit of a once lonely child who was taken from their destroyed him and then perished with intense hatred in their heart, becoming a powerful malevolent spirit. The spirit was then slain and imbued into these shoes, only becoming angrier with time. Eventually the spirit was shown that it didn't have to be alone forever and changed its ways.While wearing and attuned to these shoes, the wearer gains the following benefits.Lightstep Your walking speed increases by 10 feet, and as a bonus action you can teleport 30 feet in a flash of light.Stellar Radiance If you would deal necrotic damage, you can choose to deal radiant damage instead. Additionally, your flying speed increases by 10 feet.Crushing Aura As a bonus action, you can choose to activate your crushing aura in a 15 foot emanation centred on yourself. Any creature who starts its turn within this emanation takes 4d8 force damage. This aura lasts for 1 minute and then cannot be used again until the next dawn. If you are knocked unconscious the aura ends early.Abrahamic Concussion If you land a critical hit on a creature, you can choose one memory for the creature to forget permanently.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/bracelets/oro.title: Orobas Bracelet
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/bracelets/oro.description: Infobox A black marble on a woven bracelet. The marble is cold to the touch.While attuned to this item, you can sense the presence of all spirits within range and what category of spirit they are. Whether it be fae, devil, demon, angel, or otherwise.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/cloaks/umbral.title: Umbral Cloak
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/cloaks/umbral.description: Infobox A billowing black cloak that seems to blend into shadow. The hood of the cloak is shaped like a crow's head.While wearing this cloak you gain a +1 bonus to AC and Saving Throws, Additionally you have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with unarmed strikes.Umbral Reach. While wearing and attuned to this cloak, the range of your melee attacks increases by 5 feet as the cloak bends itself and the shadows around it. Consciousness. Housed within the cloak is the psyche of a malphas. This spirit is edgy and brooding, wishing to unleash destruction, but it also wishes to protect its wearer from harm. The spirit has an Intelligence of 10, Wisdom, of 14, and a Charisma of 15. The spirit can see out of eyes sewn into the hood of the cloak and has darkvision out to 60ft.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/eyewear/gangs.title: Gangster Sunglasses
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/eyewear/gangs.description: Infobox A pair of recognizable gangster sunglasses that many find greatly intimidating. While wearing this pair of sunglasses you have advantage on intimidation checks.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/headwear/fedo.title: Fedora of Celibacy
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/headwear/fedo.description: Infobox The Fedora of Celibacy is a black pinstriped fedora with white stripes and a nasty plastic smell. It bears powerful magic, and a powerful curse.To attune with this hat you must wear it upon your head and have never had sex. If you ever have sex you immediately break attunement with the itemIncel Repulsion. While wearing the Fedora of Celibacy you always faintly smell of dried cum. This grants you a +1 bonus to AC because no one wants to go near you. Additionally, you gain a -1 penalty to your Charisma score.Unneeded Preperation. You can cast alter cock and Contraception at will. When casting these spells part of the somatic component is tipping the fedora forward. Alter cock is cast at 4th level when cast in this way.Tip of my Hat. As an action, while attuned to the fedora you may tip it forward and grant yourself advantage on the next Charisma check you make in the next 10 minutes. Once you use this property it cannot be used again until the next dawn.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/neckwear/hedg.title: Hedgehog Strike Medallion
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/neckwear/hedg.description:
Infobox A Beautifully crafted clay amulet in the shape of a yellow hedgehog. When attuned to this item you radiate a scent of cum and orange juice.This item has three charges that it regains each day at dawn.
As a bonus action you can expend a charge to cast stormy smite. You can also choose to expend additional charges to upcast the spell.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/neckwear/merm.title: Mermaid's Pendant
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/neckwear/merm.description: Infobox On this silver chain is an iridescent blue shell that seems to faintly give off the sound of waves.These items come in sets of two, and in rarer cases three or four or more.Bonded Defence. When a set of creatures attune to mermaid pendants enchanted in a matching set, they become married as per the ceremony spell. Depending on beliefs this can mean a lot of things, but aside from that when all creatures attuned to matching pendants are within 30 feet of each other, they gain a +2 bonus to AC.Ashes to Ashes. If a creature attuned to this pendant dies via disintegration, the pendant shatters.Once attuned to this item, a creature cannot end its attunement unless the divorce ceremony ritual is cast on them, or they are widowed.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/neckwear/sire.title: Siren's Pendant
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/neckwear/sire.description:
Infobox wondrous item, rare, requires attunement
On this silver chain is an iridescent red shell that seems to faintly give off the whispers of a beautiful singing.These items come in sets of two, and in rarer cases three or four or more.Bonded Defence. When a set of creatures attune to Siren’s pendants enchanted in a matching set, they become married as per the ceremony spell. Depending on beliefs this can mean a lot of things, but aside from that when all creatures attuned to matching pendants are within 30 feet of each other, they gain a +2 bonus to AC. Siren's Allure. You gain the ability to breathe underwater and a swimming speed equal to your walking speed. You also have advantage on charisma checks made to seduce creatures to their demise.Ashes to Ashes. If a creature attuned to this pendant dies via disintegration, the pendant shatters.Once attuned to this item, a creature cannot end its attunement unless the divorce ceremony ritual is cast on them, or they are widowed.Curse. If you die while attuned to this item, your soul departs to the depths of the nearest ocean and reincarnates as a vengeful Siren spirit. You remember only fragments of your past life.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/neckwear/stat.title: Staticsilk Scarf
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/neckwear/stat.description: Infobox A finely crocheted scarf made from staticy blue silk, it hums softly with electricity.Distracting Shock. This item has 3 charges. You can expend 1 charge when you hit a creature with lightning damage, to send an extra jolt of energy into them, preventing them from taking reactions until the start of your next turn.This item regains one lost charge each day at dawn.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/other/dayligh.title: Daylight Amulet
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/other/dayligh.description: Infobox This small piece of jewlery is made of silver with an embedded lapis lazuli gemstone. Typically it is a ring, necklace, or bracelet.Sunlight Protection. While wearing this item, any creature with sunlight sensitivity, or that burns in sunlight, may ignore that vulnerability.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/other/fondue-.title: Fondue Pot of Commanding Cheese Elementals
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/other/fondue-.description: Infobox While you are within 5 feet of this fondue pot, you can take a Magic action to summon a Cheese Elemental. The elemental appears in an unoccupied space as close to the fondue pot as possible, understands your languages, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you on your Initiative count. The elemental disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it as a Bonus Action. The brazier can't be used this way again until the next dawn.
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/other/fondue-.sourcePath: 3. Statblocks/D&D 5e/Items/Other/Fondue Pot of Commanding Cheese Elementals.md

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/other/stormwi.title: Stormwind Compass
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/other/stormwi.description: Infobox A small compass carved from black opal and imbued with a storm spirits essence.Storm's Path. While inside a storm, the compass needle always points towards the easiest path through the storm.Unyielding Direction. The needle of this compass is not dissuaded by magnetic fields, and will continue to work even in the strangest landscapes.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/potions/zest-.title: Zest Potion
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/potions/zest-.description: Infobox A single slim vial of light vibrating purple glows a flicker of light repeatedly.When drank, the potion deals 1d10+1 Necrotic damage, then heals for 3d10+6 hit points.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/awake.title: Awakened Blade of Grass
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/awake.description: Infobox The Blade of Grass is a powerful shortsword manifested from the spirit of a powerful spirit. Its blade is made of soft and malleable, yet unnaturally sharp grass that strikes swifter than wind. The handle is made of a sleek and smooth wood twisting up and out of the users flesh while tendrils of grass wrap around them. Since absorbing the spirit and breath of The Bear King, the sword has gained considerable strength.While attuned to The Blade of Grass, you gain the following benefitsThe sword is unnaturally and perfectly sharp, giving it a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it, or with spells.Dual-Soul: While attuned to this sword, the spirit within it inhabits the interior of your own body. You have advantage on Charisma saving throws. Additionally, your creature type is considered fey for the purpose of effects that target fey or attuning to magic items. You still retain your original creature type.Blade Retraction: The blade is a part of your body and you can control it as such. As an object interaction you can draw or stow it from any part of your body, ready to attack.Honeyed Edge: The Blade of Grass emits a succulent honey from its blade. It deals an additional 2d6 radiant damage on attacks, and once per day you can cause the honey to run directly into a wound you cause, forcing the creature to make a DC 16 Dexterity Saving Throw, or take 2d6 radiant damage on the start of each of its turns, as radiant honey sticks to the interior of the wound and progressively worsens it and prevents it from healing. A creature can take an action to remove the honey with a DC 14 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The honey dissolves if the target receives magical healing.Feywood Chain: As an action while the blade is summon, you can transform it into a length of chain with a hard wooden grappling hook on the end, before throwing it. The length of chain can be up to 100 feet long. A creature bound with this chain is Restrained until it escapes or is let free. Escaping your feywood chain requires the creature to make a successful C 20 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check as an action. Bursting the chain requires a successful DC 22 Strength (Athletics) check as an action.Fey Delights: The sword can also transform and be used as woodcarvers tools, and as a flute.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/axe-o.title: Axe of Subsonic Shattering
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/axe-o.description: Infobox The Axe of Subsonic Shattering is a slick black guitar with the sides of it sharpened into jagged crystal edges using sorcerous magic. The magical sharpening gives this weapon finesse and a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made using it.Additionally, imbued within the guitar is the power of shattering soundwaves, allowing you to cast the shatter spell once per day, regaining this ability everyday at dawn. You also learn the shatter spell and can cast it using spell slots.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/flame.title: Flamerend Dragon Claw
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/flame.description: Infobox The Flamerend Dragon Claw is a sword fashioned from the claw of a massive light dragon that once laired near Renexann, embedded into a crossguard forged from adamantine and bound with the shed scales from an amber dragon.This sword is heavily enchanted with titan magic and is capable of cutting small holes in the fabric of reality.You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. Ignition. As a bonus action, you can whisper the draconic command word to ignite the sword. The flames of the sword shed bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. While the sword is wreathed in flame it deals an extra 2d6 fire damage on a hit. The flames remain until you use a bonus action to speak the command word again.Reality Step. This sword has 3 charges which can be used to cast the misty step spell. It regains all expended charges daily at dawn.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/slumb.title: Slumbering Blade of Grass
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/slumb.description: Infobox The Blade of Grass is a green shortsword comprised of grass and vine.The sword is unnaturally and perfectly sharp, giving it a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it, or with spells.While attuned to this blade you can retract it to wrap around your arm or summon it to your hand as a bonus action.As an action while the blade is summoned you can transform it into a length of rope with a hard wooden grappling hook at the end, then throw it. The length of the rope can be up to 50 feet long. Additionally, while attempting to grapple a creature you can choose to use the blade of grass to wrap around them giving yourself advantage on the check to grapple. While a creature is grappled in this way you cannot use the sword as a weapon

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/slumb.title: Slumbering Stormlord's Unyielding Storm
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/slumb.description: Infobox This slender golden javelin has a lightning bolt shaped head and a small spike at the other end of the weapons body. It is blessed by the stormlord, granting a small semblence of his power.This magic weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.Splitting Storm. On a critical hit, the javelin transforms into a lightning bolt that chains the damage rolled to two other targets of your choice within its throwing range. If there are no other targets within range all the bolts can strike the same creature.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/sword.title: Sword made of Tarantulas
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/items/weapons/sword.description: Infobox A small orange and black tarantula that comes in an ornate box. This tarantula is capable of taking the form of any sword. The forms it takes typically have an orange gem in the tarantula shaped hilt, and the blade is made of black metal, serrated with tarantula fangs.Stance Change. As a bonus action, you can mentally command the tarantula to transform into a type of sword you're proficient in. It crawls out of your pocket along with a swarm of other tarantulas that then coallesce and transform into the sword. This sword deals an extra 2d6 poison damage to any target it hits.Familiar. While attuned to the spider, you can also have it act as your familiar. it uses spider statistics. If it is reduced to 0 hit points it reappears in the box the next day at dawn.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/races/fox-spirit-st.title: Fox Spirit Statblock
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/races/fox-spirit-st.description: Infobox You have the keen eyes of a spirit and a fox, allowing you to see well in the dark. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.The forms of spirits are malleable in their appearance. As a spirit, you possess a glamour. As a fox spirit your glamour and appearance are even further malleable compared to that of other spirits, allowing you to shift your appearance at will rather than having a single set appearance. You can don or doff your glamour as an action, determining its appearance as per the disguise self spell. However, when you use this glamour the effect is physical. Any scars or tattoos on your body also appear on any glamoured form you take.As a fox spirit, you have a unique tie to foxes and the natural world. You can speak and understand foxes, and fox adjacent creatures (at the DM's discretion) as if by the speak with animals spell. Additionally, foxes are usually predisposed to being friendly with you due to your heritage.You are a spirit, your body and soul are one and the same. You have advantage on saving throws that would displace your soul, and you are immune to the effects of the magic jar spell. If your soul were fully removed from your body, you would lose your innate ability to do magic and become a mortal with animaleipis, or die instantly (DM's Discretion).Additionally, if you lose a limb, you can choose to expend half your hit dice (rounded up) on a short or long rest to reconstitute it as if by the regenerate spell. After reconstituting a limb in this way you only regain half your hit point maximum when you next complete a long rest.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/races/vulpalf-statb.title: Vulpalf Statblock
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/races/vulpalf-statb.description: Infobox You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.ray of frost, you can cast the dragon’s breath spell on yourself once per day. The breath damage type is cold when you cast it in this way.You have advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition.You have advantage on concentration checks, and you have resistance to psychic damage

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/1st-level/co.title: Contraception
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/1st-level/co.description: Infobox When this spell is cast the target must make a Wisdom saving throw or be affected by the spell. A target can choose to fail on the saving throw without making the save. You know whether a choose succeeds or fails the saving throw.While the spell is in effect, the target cannot become pregnant, impregnate others, or create new life by any means for the duration.The spell ends early if the caster chooses, or if the caster enters a dead-magic field.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/1st-level/co.title: Coolio's Cool Buster
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/1st-level/co.description: Infobox As an action you raise a melee weapon and focus cool arcane energy into the weapon before swiping it towards a target within range. Make a melee spell attack, on a hit the target takes 2d10 + your choice of strength or dexterity modifier Blueberry Damage. If the weapon used has a magic +1, 2, or otherwise that is also added to this modifier.When used on a creature who cannot be Spared or Pacified, it is treated as if it was cast one level higher. Additionally, the spell can take on numerous different effects, depending on ACTs used in tandem.At Higher Levels: The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above first, and the damage modifier is added an additional time.DC 16 spellcraft

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/2nd-level/bl.title: Bloodweave
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/2nd-level/bl.description: Infobox As an action, you force a creature within range to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 2d8 necrotic damage and you harvest the blood from this damage to weave it into an object of your choice. If a creature does not have blood, they are immune to the effects of the spell. On subsequent turns you can use a bonus action to deal the damage again, without need of a further saving throw. If the creature succeeded on the saving throw, they take the first turn of damage and the spell ends.When weaving the blood into objects you can choose to create any tiny object (With DM's approval), any light weapon, or a shield of blood around you. Additionally, you may make further objects with your DM's approval. Each turn, you manage to hold concentration against the creature, you can make the object larger and the object persists. When the spell ends, the object turns back into liquified blood, and when the creature dies the object liquifies again at the end of your next turn.If you manifest a blood shield, it gives you +1 AC as it hovers near you and protects you from blows. Each turn you hold concentration and funnel blood into this shield, this bonus increases by 1 to a maximum equal to the level of spell slot used to cast the spell. Additionally, if you use the blood to manifest a weapon, each turn you continue to funnel blood into the weapon, it gains an additional damage die equal to the level of spell slot used to cast the spell. If you funnel blood into an object you have already created on a subsequent turn, you cannot also manifest a new object.Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/4th-level/co.title: Coolio's Blade Mode
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/4th-level/co.description: Infobox You hold a melee weapon used in the casting of this spell aloft and focus on each individual piece of your target. You immediately make three location targeted melee attacks using the normal AC of the creature instead of the locational one. You can then make no more attacks this turn. At Higher Levels: For Every 2 spell slot levels above 4th, you can make an additional attack as part of this spell. This means 4 at 6th level, and 5 at 8th level.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/4th-level/co.title: Coolio's Geto Highlites
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/spells/4th-level/co.description: Infobox You choose a creature, a location, or an object you are familiar with, then for the duration of the casting time you use your matrix to create an image of it in its current location when you begin casting the spell onto your blank substrate. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, which is modified by the tables below via how well you know said target, or if you have any of their possessions. The target does not know it i making this saving throw, only an uneasy feeling.On a successful save the target isn’t affected, your substrate is ruined, and you cannot cast this spell again for 24 hours.On a failed save, at the end of the casting time, you finish creating the image that displays their current appearance and location. This image does not directly tell you where they are, or what their location is, but shows their general whereabouts as if their photo had been taken from 5-10 feet away.Locations do not make the saving throws and neither do nonmagical items, but magic items can make them with available modifiers should they have them, or with modifiers from the following table based on rarity.At Higher Levels: When you cast this spell with a spell slot of 5th level or higher it allows you to choose to see the moment at a specific point in time, or alternatively from a specified angle. When you cast this spell with a 5th level spell slot it can be any time within the last week, 6th level allows anytime within the last month, 7th level allows anytime within the last year, 8th level allows anytime within the last century, and 9th level allows anytime in history.

3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/transformations/ela.title: Elafrogos Transformation
3.-statblocks/d&d-5e/transformations/ela.description:
Elafrogos is a powerful aberration titan, a radiant moth from beyond the stars who feasts on raw magic to embolden himself and to feed his eternal existence.Some specially chosen warlocks of Elafrogos gain the following featuresAbility Scores: Charisma 13
Roleplay: You must be attuned with Elafrogos and have a close enough bond with him that he grants you this transformation.
Transformation Save DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifierThe following are examples of possible level milestones for Elafrogos’ chosen:
Defeating a powerful magical being and eating it
Doing a deed that receives monumental praise from Elafrogos
Sacrificing a large piece of yourself to Elafrogos
Being hit by a wave of powerful magic
Consuming another being undergoing this transformation
Starting at 1st level, you gain the following Transformation Boons and this level’s Transformation Flaw.Gus brands you as one of his favoured warlocks and makes a deal with you. You can sacrifice percentages of your life to cast additional spells or upcast spells if you run out of spell slots. At the DM’s discretion they may also allow you to use it to regain other features or magic item charges.A fragment of Gus’ hunger inhabits your body. The magic that sustains yourself slowly wanes and you must consume more every few days to maintain your soul and your life. This counter starts at 5 and decreases by 1 everyday. To add to this counter you must consume magic. Whether that be the flesh of a magical creature, a magic item, or some other form of mana. If you do not consume enough magic your body gives out and you die from the lack of energy.When you reach Stage 2, you select one appropriate Stage 2 Boon and also gain the Stage 2 flawsYou sprout moth-like wings filled with glowing stars and eyes. When unfurled, these wings emanate bright like in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet after that. Additionally, you gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed. If you already had a flying speed, your existing wings if you have them become covered in stars and eyes as per above and your flying speed increases by 20 feet.Elafrogos augments your mind with his caterpillar protecting you from outside influence. You gain resistance to psychic damage, and advantage on all wisdom saving throws that would affect your free will in any way. Additionally, you are immune to having your memories modified by anyone other than Elafrogos.Antlers sprout from your head, sharp horns embedded with glyphs. If you already had horns or antlers, they become more jagged and twisting and the glyphs burn themselves into them. Choose two spells from the wizard spell list of levels 1-3, you learn these spells and gain the ability to cast them once a day if you could not already cast spells. As a reaction when you roll initiative you can choose to cast a spell that targets either you or an ally within range.Fur and hair grows from your skin and your eyes balloon to huge proportions making you take the visage of a moth-like variant of yourself. You become attracted to light wanting to swallow and eat sources of light especially those magical. When you reach Stage 3 of your Elafrogos transformation, you select one appropriate Stage 3 Boon, and also gain the Stage 3 FlawElafrogos further augments your mind and empowers you with the psionic energy to cast the following spells:
Detect thoughts, mass suggestion, intrusive thought, dominate person, and modify memory.
You may cast from this list of spells three times per day and regain expended uses on a long rest. Additionally, if a creature would have advantage on the saving throw against any of these spells, they instead roll with disadvantage as Elafrogos bends the defences of their own mind against them.Prerequisite: Starry Wings
Your body toughens and becomes impervious to pressure. You gain the ability to hold your breath for up to a day and your body becomes able to withstand the pressure of space and the depths of the ocean.
Additionally, you gain the ability to cause your wings to glow brightly with interstellar luminance. You gain the ability to cast the blinding radiance spell without expending spell slots, instead reducing the number of days you have until you must consume more magic by 1.You gain the ability to more selectively refine and process the magical corpses you consume. Within 24 hours of consuming a magical corpse, you can spend 1 minute to regurgitate a single magic component from the corpse. This component must have a harvesting DC less than 25 and cannot be an essence.Your mouth transforms into a horrifying cavern of teeth with sectioned parts that can fold open to reveal it as well as a proboscis for liquid foods. Your appetite becomes harder to control and you now must consume magic every 3 days instead of five and the magic you must consume must be stronger. You gain a bite attack that deals 6d4 piercing damage and when you are hungry the urge to eat light and magic sources can be overwhelming. Your DM may call upon you to make a DC 16 wisdom saving throw, (ignoring any benefits gained from this transformation) or be overcome with the urge to consume.Prerequisite: Interstellar Luminance
You gain the power of a titan to fold space. Your flying speed increases by 30 feet and you gain the ability to cast plane shift once per day. When you cast plane shift in this way you can jump across space or to other realities connected to your own. Additionally, your blood becomes that of minor titan blood, and you count as a titan for the purposes of spells or effects against them.You grow a massive mouth along the centre of your torso full of jagged teeth. With this mouth you can more easily consume the corpses of magical creatures. Once per day when you consume a magical creature in this way you can choose one ability from the creature’s statblock and gain it as if it was an ability of your own. Your body changes to accommodate the feature and it persists for 24 hours or until you take a long rest.Prerequisite: Can cast spells
You grow a massive mouth along the centre of your torso full of jagged teeth. With this mouth you can consume magic directly and funnel it straight into your soul. You can consume spell scrolls from any class. When you consume a spell scroll from another class, you learn that spell as if it were a known spell for you, however you can only prepare an amount of these spells per day equal to your spellcasting ability modifier. Additionally, you can only prepare a spell consumed in this way if you possess the spell slots to cast it.You grow one size category larger than you already were, the DC to avoid giving in to urges of hunger becomes 20, and your creature type becomes aberration for the purposes of effects and spells against them. Additionally, the magic you must consume every few days grows in strength. You must consume magic equivalent to 7th level each time you wish to replenish your body, and you must do so each day to survive.

welcome.html.title: Welcome
welcome.html.description: Welcome to Mytharia!Mytharia is a world about legacy, a world about connection, and a world about how people shape this world. Mytharia is a fantasy setting, with some sci-fi elements to it. Further genres depend on the exact stories told within.Mytharia is also a setting that is meant to explore the effects of these fantasy elements, monsters and magic, the occult and the profane, on a world and on different societies within it. It is a setting about exploring the limits of the implications of events and things.So anyway, go off an explore the wiki, hopefully you enjoy!

info_showOrphanNodes.description: Show nodes that are not connected to any other nodes.

info_showAttachments.description: Show attachments like images and PDFs as nodes in the graph.

info_allowGlobalGraph.description: Allow the user to view the global graph of all nodes.

info_allowExpand.description: Allow the user to pop-out the graph view to take up the whole screen

info_attractionForce.description: How much should linked nodes attract each other? This will make the graph appear more clustered.

info_linkLength.description: How long should the links between nodes be? The shorter the links the more connected nodes will cluster together.

info_repulsionForce.description: How much should nodes repel each other? This will make disconnected parts more spread out.

info_centralForce.description: How much should nodes be attracted to the center? This will make the graph appear more dense and circular.

info_edgePruning.description: Edges with a length above this threshold will not be rendered, however they will still contribute to the simulation. This can help large tangled graphs look more organised. Hovering over a node will still display these links.

info_minNodeRadius.description: How small should the smallest nodes be? The smaller a node is the less it will attract other nodes.

info_maxNodeRadius.description: How large should the largest nodes be? Nodes are sized by how many links they have. The larger a node is the more it will attract other nodes. This can be used to create a good grouping around the most important nodes.
